zh.lifeSummary: 當Emme Bourchier於1444年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex40歲，母親Isabel of Cambridge36歲。她於1463年與Sir Peter Osborne在英國艾可馬爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在英國英格蘭艾可拉欽格頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國肯特哈特利普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emme Bourchier于1444年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex40岁，母亲Isabel of Cambridge36岁。她于1463年与Sir Peter Osborne在英国艾可馬爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在英国英格兰艾可拉欽格頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国肯特哈特利普。

nameMeanings.name: Bourchier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: perhaps a variant of   Burcher   (  see  Bircher  ). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2). The name has sometimes been altered to or confused with   Bouchier   and   Boucher  .

2 Norman, English: locative name of uncertain origin but it is presumably from a French place-name, perhaps Boursières in Haute-Saône. The name was early confused with other surnames and may survive in Bouchier, Bowcher, Bowser, and Boozer . The surname gave rise to a number of minor place-names in Essex: Bourchier’s alias Bouchier’s Hall in Aldham, Bourchier’s Hall in Messing; Bouchier’s Grange in Great Coggeshall, Bouchiers Chapel in Tollesbury, Boarstye Fm and Bowser’s Hall in Rivenhall (Essex), and Boose’s Green in Colne Engayne.

variants.name: Bourcier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Lucien, Armand, Emile.
French: variant of   Boursier   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Bourcier are descendants of Jean Boursier dit Lavigne from France (see Boursier ).

variants.name: Bircher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Albrecht, Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ulrich.
South German and Swiss German: topographic name for someone who lived by a birch tree or in a birch wood, from Middle High German birche ‘birch’ + the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.
English: habitational name from Birchover in Derbyshire or Bircher in Hereford, both named as from Old English birce ‘birch’ + ofer ‘ridge’.

variants.name: Bouchier
meanings: 1  English: variant of   Butcher  .
2  English: alternatively a variant of   Belcher  .
3  Norman, English: possibly a variant of   Bourchier   (2).

variants.name: Bowser
meanings: English: nickname from either from Old French beu cher ‘good company’, or from Old French beu sire ‘fair sir’ (see Belcher ), given either to a fine gentleman (perhaps ironically), or to someone who made frequent use of this term of address. Compare Bonser and Boozer .
English: variant of   Bolsover  .
Americanized form of German   Bauser  .

variants.name: Boozer
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German   Buser  .
English (Kent): variant of   Bowser   1.

variants.name: Burcher
meanings: English: variant of   Bircher  .

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Borger
meanings: North German (also Börger) and Dutch: variant of Burger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from Yiddish borger ‘borrower’ or ‘lender’.
Norwegian and Swedish: habitational name for someone from a place called Borg (see   Borg  ), or a topographic name for someone living by a fortification or near a hill resembling a fortification.

nameMeanings.name: Emme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Emma  ,   Emily  , and related names, now used increasingly as an independent given name.

variants.name: Emmy
meanings: Pet form of   Emma  ,   Emily  , and related names, now used increasingly as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Emme Bourchier was born in 1444, in Essex, England, her father, Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex, was 40 and her mother, Isabel of Cambridge, was 36. She married Sir Peter Osborne in 1463, in Maldon, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1500, in Latchingdon, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Hartlip, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emme Bourchier est née en 1444, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabel of Cambridge, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Peter Osborne en 1463, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Latchingdon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Hartlip, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emme Bourchier 1444 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex 40 und ihre Mutter Isabel of Cambridge 36. Sie hat 1463 in Maldon, Essex, England Sir Peter Osborne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Latchingdon, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hartlip, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emme Bourchier è nata il nel 1444 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Isabel of Cambridge, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Peter Osborne nel 1463, nel Maldon, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1500, nel Latchingdon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Hartlip, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emme Bourchierが1444年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essexは40歳，母Isabel of Cambridgeは36歳であった。1463年にイギリスエセックスマルドンでSir Peter Osborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年にイギリスイギリスエセックスラトチングドンで56歳で死去し，イギリスケントハートリップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emme Bourchier(이)가 1444년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel of Cambridge(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 에세스 맬던에서 Sir Peter Osborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 라트친그던에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 하틀립에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emme Bourchier nasceu em 1444, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabel of Cambridge, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Peter Osborne em 1463, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Latchingdon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Hartlip, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emme Bourchier родилась в 1444 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel of Cambridge, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter Osborne в 1463 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности лачингдон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности хартлип, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emme Bourchier nació en 1444, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Bourchier, Earl of Essex, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabel of Cambridge, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir Peter Osborne en 1463, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1500, en Latchingdon, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Hartlip, Kent, Inglaterra.
